title: C++ Programming Basics: Keywords Overview
desc: A comprehensive list of C++ keywords categorized by usage, including types, control flow, and OOP.

title: Python Escape Characters Guide
desc: Learn common escape sequences in Python strings with examples and usage tips.

title: Advanced Calculus Review: Taylor's Theorem
desc: Covers Taylor's theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms.

title: 高等微积分作业：级数收敛性分析
desc: 判断六个级数的收敛发散性，包括比较判别法和比值判别法。

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 10
desc: Surface and line integrals computed via parametrization and potential function.

title: 高等微积分作业：幂级数与函数展开
desc: 分析幂级数收敛域、求和公式及函数项级数性质。

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 3
desc: Metric on continuous functions, Cauchy sequences, Cauchy-Schwarz inequality, open sets.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 4
desc: Proves existence of minima on R^2 and extrema on unit circle.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 5
desc: Partial derivatives computation for various composite functions.

title: Implicit Function and Taylor Expansion
desc: Derives implicit function z(x,y) from cubic equation and computes its second-order Taylor expansion.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 7 Analysis
desc: Find critical points and classify extrema for two functions.

title: 高等微积分作业：换元法求面积与积分
desc: 利用变量替换计算区域面积与三重积分，展示换元公式应用。

title: Advanced Calculus Homework 9: Surface Area and Center of Mass
desc: Compute ellipsoid surface area via double integral and hemisphere center of mass.

title: 复变函数作业：模恒等式与倍角公式
desc: 证明模为1的恒等式，推导cos(nθ)和sin(nθ)的表达式。

title: Complex Analysis Homework 10: Residue Theorem
desc: Using residue theorem to compute integrals with trigonometric and hyperbolic functions.

title: 复变函数第11次作业：留数定理应用
desc: 利用留数定理计算三个含支点积分，涉及割线和围道选择。

title: 复变函数作业：初等与多值函数
desc: 证明三角与双曲函数的恒等式及不等式，涉及指数形式推导。

title: 复变函数作业：多值函数与支点分析
desc: 判断多值函数支点，计算沿不同路径的函数值。

title: 复变函数第4次作业解答
desc: 计算围道积分并确定参数a使函数单值

title: Complex Analysis Homework 5 Analysis
desc: Counterexamples for series convergence and absolute convergence tests.

title: 复变函数第6次作业分析
desc: 确定级数收敛半径，证明和函数不连续，求和函数。

title: Complex Analysis Homework 7: Taylor Series
desc: Expand sec z, log, and sqrt functions in Taylor series with convergence radii.

title: 复变函数第8次作业：Laurent展开
desc: 求解三个函数在不同区域的Laurent展开，包括奇点分析。

title: 复变函数作业：解析延拓与奇点分析
desc: 证明两个级数互为解析延拓，并分析奇点分布。

title: Spring Vibration Problem Setup
desc: Derives wave equation, boundary and initial conditions for a hanging spring with mass.

title: Spherical Harmonic Expansion & PDE Solution
desc: Expand functions in spherical harmonics and solve Laplace equation with source terms.

title: Math-Physics Equation Homework 11
desc: Integral calculation using substitution and Bessel function J2.

title: 铀块临界半径求解：圆柱与球
desc: 通过扩散方程和贝塞尔函数，求解细长圆柱和球形铀块的临界半径。

title: Dirac Delta Function Identities and Coordinate Representations
desc: Proofs of delta function identities and representations in spherical and cylindrical coordinates.

title: Laplace Transform for Forced Oscillations
desc: Solve forced vibration using Laplace transform with partial fractions.
